name: the-book-of-life
description: Jiddu Krishnamurti's daily meditations — a contemplative toolkit for self-inquiry, choiceless awareness, and freedom from psychological conditioning through direct perception.
useCase: Self-inquiry, ending psychological suffering, understanding the structure of the self, observing without judgment, meditation without method.
knownRisks: Krishnamurti rejects all systems and methods — users seeking step-by-step guidance may be frustrated
The book is a collection of daily meditations, not a narrative or a structured course
Some may find Krishnamurti's radical negation disturbing or disorienting
